---
title: "rra - initial analysis"
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
  html_notebook: default
  pdf_document: default
---

In this document the predictions made by the networks that have shown a nice training graph are combined with the ground truth data and their effectiveness is evaluated by looking into how strongly each network deviates from the ground truth.

Predictions from the following networks are analysed:

-   EfficientNet**B2**

-   EfficientNet**B5**

-   **Xception**

-   ConvNext**Tiny**

The following librarys are used:

```{r}
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggpubr)
```

# 1. Load predictions and ground truth for complexity and groundcover

First the working directory is temporarily changed, then all the data is loaded. Also the image path is shortened to only contain the file name.

```{r}
#### Path handling for different OS ####
if (.Platform$OS.type == "windows") {
  strWDpath <- "E:/Paper_1/2_work"
} else {
  strWDpath <- "/home/khochholzer/NAS/Paper_1/2_work"
}
strWDpath <- normalizePath(strWDpath, winslash = "/")

source("support_functions.R")
# load groundtruth
l_GTgc <- read.csv(
  file = "../../1_dataRaw/paths_and_labels.csv",
  sep = ",",
  dec = "."
)
l_GTco <- read.csv(
  file = "../../1_dataRaw/compl_cleaned.csv",
  sep = ",",
  dec = "."
)

# select columns for complexity
l_GTco <- l_GTco %>% select(image_path, starts_with("grade_"))

# load predictions of groundcover
l_B2gc <- read.csv(file.path(get_newest_directory("../output/groundcover/efficientnetb2"), "predictions.csv"), sep = ",", dec = ".")
l_B5gc <- read.csv(file.path(get_newest_directory("../output/groundcover/efficientnetb5"), "predictions.csv"), sep = ",", dec = ".")
l_XCgc <- read.csv(file.path(get_newest_directory("../output/groundcover/xception"), "predictions.csv"), sep = ",", dec = ".")
l_TYgc <- read.csv(file.path(get_newest_directory("../output/groundcover/convnext_tiny"), "predictions.csv"), sep = ",", dec = ".")

# load predictions of complexity
l_B2co <- read.csv(file.path(get_newest_directory("../output/complexity/efficientnetb2"), "predictions.csv"), sep = ",", dec = ".")
l_B5co <- read.csv(file.path(get_newest_directory("../output/complexity/efficientnetb5"), "predictions.csv"), sep = ",", dec = ".")
l_XCco <- read.csv(file.path(get_newest_directory("../output/complexity/xception"), "predictions.csv"), sep = ",", dec = ".")
l_TYco <- read.csv(file.path(get_newest_directory("../output/complexity/convnext_tiny"), "predictions.csv"), sep = ",", dec = ".")

# put image name into a column
l_GTgc$img <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(l_GTgc$image_path))
l_GTco$img <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(l_GTco$image_path))
l_B2gc$img <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(l_B2gc$image_path))
l_B5gc$img <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(l_B5gc$image_path))
l_XCgc$img <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(l_XCgc$image_path))
l_TYgc$img <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(l_TYgc$image_path))
l_B2co$img <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(l_B2co$image_path))
l_B5co$img <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(l_B5co$image_path))
l_XCco$img <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(l_XCco$image_path))
l_TYco$img <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(l_TYco$image_path))

# remove image_path column
l_GTgc[,11] <- NULL
l_GTco[,1] <- NULL
l_B2gc[,1] <- NULL
l_B5gc[,1] <- NULL
l_XCgc[,1] <- NULL
l_TYgc[,1] <- NULL
l_B2co[,1] <- NULL
l_B5co[,1] <- NULL
l_XCco[,1] <- NULL
l_TYco[,1] <- NULL

# new column with datasource
l_GTgc$src <- "GT"
l_GTco$src <- "GT"
l_B2gc$src <- "B2"
l_B5gc$src <- "B5"
l_XCgc$src <- "XC"
l_TYgc$src <- "TY"
l_B2co$src <- "B2"
l_B5co$src <- "B5"
l_XCco$src <- "XC"
l_TYco$src <- "TY"

# make sure column names for ground cover are consistent
strNewCol <- c("gc_maturetree","gc_rejuvenation","gc_shrublayer","gc_mosses",
               "gc_ferns","gc_herblayer","gc_grasses","gc_soilfoilage",
               "gc_rock","gc_deadwoodstumps")
colnames(l_GTgc)[1:10] <- strNewCol
colnames(l_B2gc)[1:10] <- strNewCol
colnames(l_B5gc)[1:10] <- strNewCol
colnames(l_XCgc)[1:10] <- strNewCol
colnames(l_TYgc)[1:10] <- strNewCol
rm(strNewCol)
```

### Naming convention of the .jpg files

16_spruce_c_3_P.jpg

| 16_spruce (triplet number) | c (manag. category) | 3 (sub plot) | P (orientation)   |
|-------------------|------------------|------------------|------------------|
| 1-17 = spruce              | c = cleared site    | 1-15         | N = towards north |
| 21-33 = beech              | l = living site     |              | E = towards east  |
| 41-47 = oak                | d = dead site       |              | S = towards south |
| 61-66 = pine               |                     |              | W = towards west  |
|                            |                     |              | P = ground pic    |

# 2. Combine groundtruth and predictions

Now that all the data is loaded, the predictions and ground truth are combined. But before the combination happens, only lines that exist also in the other sets are considered.

```{r}
l_GTco_tmp <- l_GTco[which(l_GTco$img %in% dplyr::intersect(l_GTco$img, l_B5co$img)),]
l_B2co_tmp <- l_B2co[which(l_B2co$img %in% dplyr::intersect(l_GTco$img, l_B2co$img)),]
l_B5co_tmp <- l_B5co[which(l_B5co$img %in% dplyr::intersect(l_GTco$img, l_B5co$img)),]
l_XCco_tmp <- l_XCco[which(l_XCco$img %in% dplyr::intersect(l_GTco$img, l_XCco$img)),]
l_TYco_tmp <- l_TYco[which(l_TYco$img %in% dplyr::intersect(l_GTco$img, l_TYco$img)),]

l_GTgc_tmp <- l_GTgc[which(l_GTgc$img %in% dplyr::intersect(l_GTgc$img, l_B5gc$img)),]
l_B2gc_tmp <- l_B2gc[which(l_B2gc$img %in% dplyr::intersect(l_GTgc$img, l_B2gc$img)),]
l_B5gc_tmp <- l_B5gc[which(l_B5gc$img %in% dplyr::intersect(l_GTgc$img, l_B5gc$img)),]
l_XCgc_tmp <- l_XCgc[which(l_XCgc$img %in% dplyr::intersect(l_GTgc$img, l_XCgc$img)),]
l_TYgc_tmp <- l_TYgc[which(l_TYgc$img %in% dplyr::intersect(l_GTgc$img, l_TYgc$img)),]

## Bind data frames together for complexity and ground cover
w_dfCOdata <- rbind(l_GTco_tmp, l_B2co_tmp, l_B5co_tmp, l_XCco_tmp, l_TYco_tmp)
w_dfGCdata <- rbind(l_GTgc_tmp, l_B2gc_tmp, l_B5gc_tmp, l_XCgc_tmp, l_TYgc_tmp)

w_dfCOdata$src <- as.factor(w_dfCOdata$src)
w_dfGCdata$src <- as.factor(w_dfGCdata$src)

rm(l_GTco_tmp,l_B2co_tmp,l_B5co_tmp,l_XCco_tmp,l_TYco_tmp)
rm(l_GTgc_tmp,l_B2gc_tmp,l_B5gc_tmp,l_XCgc_tmp,l_TYgc_tmp)
```

## 2.1 Long format

The long format is useful when wanting to plot multiple parameters at the same time. ggplot uses this format a lot.

```{r}
# complexity
l_dfCOdata <- pivot_longer(w_dfCOdata,
                           cols = starts_with("grade_"),
                           names_to = "paras",
                           values_to = "vals")
l_dfCOdata$img <- as.factor(l_dfCOdata$img)
l_dfCOdata$paras <- as.factor(l_dfCOdata$paras)
# ground cover
l_dfGCdata <- pivot_longer(w_dfGCdata,
                           cols = starts_with("gc_"),
                           names_to = "paras",
                           values_to = "vals")
l_dfGCdata$img <- as.factor(l_dfGCdata$img)
l_dfGCdata$paras <- as.factor(l_dfGCdata$paras)
```

# 3. Create analysis plots

For plot creation the library "ggpubr" is used. Also a function for error bars in bar plot is created.

```{r}
f_plot_img_bars_co <- function(data, factorlvl) {
  ggplot(data[data$img == factorlvl,], aes(x = paras, y = vals, fill = src)) +
    geom_bar(position = "dodge", stat = "identity") +
    labs(y = "Structure grade",
         x = NULL,
         title = sprintf("Structure grade per class for img %s", factorlvl),
         fill = NULL) +
    geom_text(aes(label = round(vals, 2)),
              position = position_dodge(width = 0.9),
              vjust = -0.5,size = 3) +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,5)) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1))
}
f_plot_img_bars_gc <- function(data, factorlvl) {
  ggplot(data[data$img == factorlvl,], aes(x = paras, y = vals, fill = src)) +
    geom_bar(position = "dodge", stat = "identity") +
    labs(y = "% ground cover",
         x = NULL,
         title = sprintf("ground cover per class for img %s", factorlvl),
         fill = NULL) +
    geom_text(aes(label = round(vals, 2)),
              position = position_dodge(width = 0.9),
              vjust = -0.5,size = 3) +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1)) + 
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1))
}
```

Create data frames with the mean values per source. And also put them into the long format

```{r}
w_dfCOmeans <- w_dfCOdata %>%
  group_by(src) %>%
  summarise(across(starts_with("grade_"), list(mean = mean, sd = sd)))
w_dfGCmeans <- w_dfGCdata %>%
  group_by(src) %>%
  summarise(across(starts_with("gc_"), list(mean = mean, sd = sd)))

l_dfCOmeans <- pivot_longer(w_dfCOmeans,
                            cols = !src,
                            names_to = c("para",".value"),
                            names_pattern = "(\\w+_\\w+)_(\\w+)")
l_dfGCmeans <- pivot_longer(w_dfGCmeans,
                            cols = !src,
                            names_to = c("para",".value"),
                            names_pattern = "(\\w+_\\w+)_(\\w+)")
```

## 3.1 Plot barchart with means for all sources

The long format is used to create barplots that show the mean structure grade and ground cover for each class, the predicted value and the ground cover.

```{r}
ggarrange(
  ggplot(l_dfCOmeans, aes(x = para, y = mean, fill = src)) +
    geom_col(position = "dodge") +
    geom_errorbar(aes(x = para,
                      ymin = mean-(sd/sqrt(345)),
                      ymax = mean+(sd/sqrt(345))
                      ),
                  alpha = 0.8,
                  position = position_dodge(width=0.9),
                  width = 0.4) +
    labs(y = "Structure grade",
         x = NULL,
         title = "Mean structure grade incl. SE",
         fill = NULL) +
    geom_text(aes(label = round(mean, 2)),
              position = position_dodge(width = 0.9),
              vjust = -2, size = 3) +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,5)) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1)),
  
  ggplot(l_dfGCmeans, aes(x = para, y = mean, fill = src)) +
    geom_col(position = "dodge") +
    geom_errorbar(aes(x = para,
                      ymin = mean-(sd/sqrt(345)),
                      ymax = mean+(sd/sqrt(345))
                      ),
                  alpha = 0.8,
                  position = position_dodge(width=0.9),
                  width = 0.4) +
    labs(y = "% Ground cover",
         x = NULL,
         title = "Mean ground cover incl. SE",
         fill = NULL) +
    geom_text(aes(label = round(mean, 2)),
              position = position_dodge(width = 0.9),
              vjust = -2,
              size = 3) +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1)) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1)),

  common.legend = TRUE
)
```

## 3.2 Plot the structure grade barchart for every picture

Here for all 345 or 1241 pictures the ground truth is plottet together with the predictions of all models.

```{r}
lplots_co <- lapply(levels(l_dfCOdata$img), f_plot_img_bars_co, data = l_dfCOdata)
length(lplots_co)
lplots_co[[60]]

lplots_gc <- lapply(levels(l_dfGCdata$img), f_plot_img_bars_gc, data = l_dfGCdata)
length(lplots_gc)
lplots_gc[[60]]
```

## 3.3 Plot scatterplots for means

```{r}
ggplot(l_dfCOdata, aes(x = src, y = vals, col = src)) +
  geom_point() +
  theme_bw() +
  facet_wrap(~paras)
ggplot(l_dfGCdata, aes(x = src, y = vals, col = src)) +
  geom_point() +
  theme_bw() +
  facet_wrap(~paras)
```

# 4. Work with deviations

Here the idea is to calculate the deviation of each predicted value from the ground truth. Once the deviation is calculated the deviation can be used to identify images were the prediction was accurate and where it was not. Also using mean deviations the overall performance of a model can be evaluated.

## 4.1 Calculate deviations

Calculation of deviation was already done using Python, so this data can be loaded into R and used from here on out. deviation = ground truth - prediction

### 4.1.1 Load datasets created in Python
New code uses the groundtruth and predictions loaded in the beginning and calculates the deviation here manually. Also a aggregation will be made to site level.
```{r}
# Combine all complexity and groundcover prediction into on data frame
# Add ground truth to data frames
w_deltCO <- inner_join(
  x = rbind(l_B2co, l_B5co, l_XCco, l_TYco),
  y = l_GTco %>% select(-src),
  by = join_by(img),
  suffix = c("_pr", "_gt")
)
w_deltGC <- inner_join(
  x = rbind(l_B2gc, l_B5gc, l_XCgc, l_TYgc),
  y = l_GTgc %>% select(-src),
  by = join_by(img),
  suffix = c("_pr", "_gt")
)

# Aggregate to patch level
## Split image name
w_deltCO_agg <- w_deltCO %>%
  separate_wider_delim(
    cols = img,
    delim = "_",
    names = c("triplet","species","manag","sub_plt","orient")
  )
w_deltGC_agg <- w_deltGC %>% 
  separate_wider_delim(
    cols = img,
    delim = "_",
    names = c("triplet","species","manag","sub_plt","orient")
  )
## Actual aggregation
w_deltCO_agg <- w_deltCO_agg %>%
  group_by(triplet, species, manag, src) %>% 
  summarise(across(starts_with("grade_"), list(mean))) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  rename_with(~ gsub("_1", "", .x))

w_deltGC_agg <- w_deltGC_agg %>% 
  group_by(triplet, species, manag, src) %>% 
  summarise(across(starts_with("gc_"), list(mean))) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  rename_with(~ gsub("_1", "", .x))
```

### 4.1.2 Calculating deviation

Michi did some rounding of the deviations, I want to do it without rounding fist. So now I calculate the deviation manually for all the data loaded.

```{r}
# Complexity
w_deltCO <- w_deltCO %>% mutate(
  treespecies_delta = grade_treespecies_pr - grade_treespecies_gt,
  shrubs_delta      = grade_shrubs_pr      - grade_shrubs_gt,
  herbs_delta       = grade_herbs_pr       - grade_herbs_gt,
  grass_delta       = grade_grass_pr       - grade_grass_gt,
  moss_delta        = grade_moss_pr        - grade_moss_gt,
  deadwood_delta    = grade_deadwood_pr    - grade_deadwood_gt,
  layers_delta      = grade_layers_pr      - grade_layers_gt,
  mixing_delta      = grade_mixing_pr      - grade_mixing_gt
)
# Aggregated complexity
w_deltCO_agg <- w_deltCO_agg %>% mutate(
  treespecies_delta = grade_treespecies_pr - grade_treespecies_gt,
  shrubs_delta      = grade_shrubs_pr      - grade_shrubs_gt,
  herbs_delta       = grade_herbs_pr       - grade_herbs_gt,
  grass_delta       = grade_grass_pr       - grade_grass_gt,
  moss_delta        = grade_moss_pr        - grade_moss_gt,
  deadwood_delta    = grade_deadwood_pr    - grade_deadwood_gt,
  layers_delta      = grade_layers_pr      - grade_layers_gt,
  mixing_delta      = grade_mixing_pr      - grade_mixing_gt
)

# Groundcover
w_deltGC <- w_deltGC %>% mutate(
  maturetree_delta   = gc_maturetree_pr     - gc_maturetree_gt,
  rejuvenation_delta = gc_rejuvenation_pr   - gc_rejuvenation_gt,
  shrublayer_delta   = gc_shrublayer_pr     - gc_shrublayer_gt,
  mosses_delta       = gc_mosses_pr         - gc_mosses_gt,
  ferns_delta        = gc_ferns_pr          - gc_ferns_gt,
  herblayer_delta    = gc_herblayer_pr      - gc_herblayer_gt,
  grasses_delta      = gc_grasses_pr        - gc_grasses_gt,
  soilfoilage_delta  = gc_soilfoilage_pr    - gc_soilfoilage_gt,
  rock_delta         = gc_rock_pr           - gc_rock_gt,
  deadwood_delta     = gc_deadwoodstumps_pr - gc_deadwoodstumps_gt
)
# Aggregated groundcover
w_deltGC_agg <- w_deltGC_agg %>% mutate(
  maturetree_delta   = gc_maturetree_pr     - gc_maturetree_gt,
  rejuvenation_delta = gc_rejuvenation_pr   - gc_rejuvenation_gt,
  shrublayer_delta   = gc_shrublayer_pr     - gc_shrublayer_gt,
  mosses_delta       = gc_mosses_pr         - gc_mosses_gt,
  ferns_delta        = gc_ferns_pr          - gc_ferns_gt,
  herblayer_delta    = gc_herblayer_pr      - gc_herblayer_gt,
  grasses_delta      = gc_grasses_pr        - gc_grasses_gt,
  soilfoilage_delta  = gc_soilfoilage_pr    - gc_soilfoilage_gt,
  rock_delta         = gc_rock_pr           - gc_rock_gt,
  deadwood_delta     = gc_deadwoodstumps_pr - gc_deadwoodstumps_gt
)
```

### 4.1.3 Calculate mean deviations

Mean deviations are useful for determining the models overall effectiveness, whether it performed well or not.

```{r}
w_deltCO_means <- w_deltCO %>% group_by(src) %>%
  summarise(across(ends_with("_delta"), list(mean = mean, sd = sd)))
w_deltCOagg_means <- w_deltCO_agg %>% group_by(src) %>% 
  summarise(across(ends_with("_delta"), list(mean = mean, sd = sd)))

w_deltGC_means <- w_deltGC %>% group_by(src) %>%
  summarise(across(ends_with("_delta"), list(mean = mean, sd = sd)))
w_deltGCagg_means <- w_deltGC_agg %>% group_by(src) %>%
  summarise(across(ends_with("_delta"), list(mean = mean, sd = sd)))
```

Create a table were the overall mean deviation is shown.

```{r}
w_deltCO_means$src
rowMeans(w_deltCO_means %>% dplyr::select(!src, ends_with("mean")))
w_deltCOagg_means$src
rowMeans(w_deltCOagg_means %>% dplyr::select(!src, ends_with("mean")))

w_deltGC_means$src
rowMeans(w_deltGC_means %>% dplyr::select(!src, ends_with("mean")))
w_deltGCagg_means$src
rowMeans(w_deltGCagg_means %>% dplyr::select(!src, ends_with("mean")))
```

| Complexity / Ground cover | Model  | Overall mean deviation | Aggr. mean deviation |
|-------------------|------------------|------------------|------------------|
| Complexity                | B2     | 0.3688234              | 0.1302455            |
| Complexity                | B5     | 0.3639072              | 0.1444950            |
| Complexity                | TY     | 0.7006508              | 0.4813070            |
| **Complexity**            | **XC** | **0.4208935**         | **0.2060504**        |
| Ground cover              | B2     | 0.06618497             | 0.04504430           |
| Ground cover              | B5     | 0.05503333             | 0.03411948           |
| Ground cover              | TY     | 0.06517180             | 0.04501067           |
| **Ground cover**          | **XC** | **0.06142015**         | **0.03966947**       |

The lowest mean deviation is found in the XCEPTION model, it seems like this model yields the best results.

### 4.1.4 Calculate error metrics 
To compare model performance some error metrics are calculated.
- Mean absolute error (MAE) $$\text{MAE} = \sum_{i=1}^{D}|x_i-y_i|$$
- Mean squared error (MSE) $$\text{MSE} = \sum_{i=1}^{D}(x_i-y_i)^2$$
- Root mean squared error (RMSE) $$\text{RMSE} = \sqrt{\sum_{i=1}^{D}(x_i-y_i)^2}$$
- R² as result of residual sum of squares and total sum of squares $$\text{R²} = 1 - \frac{\sum{y_i-\hat{y_i}}}{\sum{y_i-\overline{y}}} = \frac{SS_{residuals}}{SS_{total}}$$
```{r}
f_long_pr_gt_delt <- function(dataframe) {
  r_df <- dataframe %>% 
    pivot_longer(
      cols = -c(img, src),
      names_to = c("parameter", ".value"),
      names_pattern = "(?:grade_|gc_)?(.*)_(pr|gt|delta)"
    ) %>% 
    rename(
      predictions = pr,
      groundtruth = gt,
      error = delta
    )
  return(r_df)
}

# Data preparation
l_deltCO <- f_long_pr_gt_delt(w_deltCO)
l_deltGC <- f_long_pr_gt_delt(
  w_deltGC %>% rename(
    deadwoodstumps_delta = deadwood_delta
  )
)
l_deltCO$error[is.na(l_deltCO$error)] <- 0
l_deltGC$error[is.na(l_deltGC$error)] <- 0

l_deltCO
l_deltGC

# Metric calculation
f_calc_errors <- function(df) {
  errors <- tibble()
  for (mod in unique(df$src)) {
    curr_df <- df[df$src == mod,]
    curr_error <- curr_df$error
    curr_GT <- curr_df$groundtruth
    curr_pred <- curr_df$predictions
    
    error <- tibble(
      model = mod,
      mae = f_MAE(curr_error),
      mse = f_MSE(curr_error),
      rmse = f_RMSE(curr_error),
      r_squared = f_R2(prediction = curr_pred, groundtruth = curr_GT)
    )
    errors <- bind_rows(errors, error)
  }
  return(errors)
}

co_errors <- f_calc_errors(l_deltCO)
gc_errors <- f_calc_errors(l_deltGC)

co_errors$src <- "context"
gc_errors$src <- "ground"

co_errors
gc_errors
```
Write error metrics to .csv:
```{r}
write.csv(
  bind_rows(co_errors, gc_errors),
  file = file.path(strWDpath, "R", "output", "gc_co_model_errormetrics.csv")
)
```


## 4.2 Plot deviations

Visualising deviations across all models.

### 4.2.1 Plot mean deviations

First plot the mean deviations across all pictures.

```{r}
## Plot means
ggarrange(
  # complexity
  ggplot(pivot_longer(w_deltCO_means,
                      cols = !src,
                      names_to = c("para",".value"),
                      names_pattern = "(\\w+_\\w+)_(\\w+)"),
         aes(x = para, y = mean, fill = src)) +
    geom_col(position = "dodge") + theme_bw() +
    labs(y = "mean deviation", x = NULL) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1)) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(x = para,
                      ymin = mean-(sd/sqrt(345)),
                      ymax = mean+(sd/sqrt(345))
                      ),
                  alpha = 0.8,
                  position = position_dodge(width=0.9),
                  width = 0.4) +
    ylim(c(-1,2.5)),
  
  # aggregated complexity
  ggplot(pivot_longer(w_deltCOagg_means,
                      cols = !src,
                      names_to = c("para",".value"),
                      names_pattern = "(\\w+_\\w+)_(\\w+)"),
         aes(x = para, y = mean, fill = src)) +
    geom_col(position = "dodge") +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(y = "mean deviation", x = NULL) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1)) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(x = para,
                      ymin = mean-(sd/sqrt(345)),
                      ymax = mean+(sd/sqrt(345))
                      ),
                  alpha = 0.8,
                  position = position_dodge(width=0.9),
                  width = 0.4) +
    ylim(c(-1,2.5)),
  
  # ground cover
  ggplot(pivot_longer(w_deltGC_means, cols = !src,
                      names_to = c("para",".value"),
                      names_pattern = "(\\w+_\\w+)_(\\w+)"),
         aes(x = para, y = mean, fill = src)) +
    geom_col(position = "dodge") + theme_bw() +
    labs(y = "mean deviation", x = NULL) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1)) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(x = para,
                      ymin = mean-(sd/sqrt(345)),
                      ymax = mean+(sd/sqrt(345))
                      ),
                  alpha = 0.8,
                  position = position_dodge(width=0.9),
                  width = 0.4) +
    ylim(c(-1,1)),
  # aggregated ground cover
  ggplot(pivot_longer(w_deltGCagg_means,
                      cols = !src,
                      names_to = c("para",".value"),
                      names_pattern = "(\\w+_\\w+)_(\\w+)"),
         aes(x = para, y = mean, fill = src)) +
    geom_col(position = "dodge") +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(y = "mean deviation", x = NULL) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1)) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(x = para, 
                      ymin = mean-(sd/sqrt(345)),
                      ymax = mean+(sd/sqrt(345))
                      ),
                  alpha = 0.8,
                  position = position_dodge(width=0.9),
                  width = 0.4) +
    ylim(c(-1,1)),

  common.legend = TRUE, labels = "auto"
)
```

### 4.2.2 Plot deviations

With plotting the deviation we can see which model performed better.

```{r}
ggarrange(
  ggplot(w_deltCO, aes(x = grade_treespecies_pr,
                       y = treespecies_delta,
                       col = src)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0) + geom_point(alpha = 0.5) + theme_bw() +
    facet_grid(cols = vars(src)),
  
  ggplot(w_deltCO, aes(x = grade_shrubs_pr, y = shrubs_delta, col = src)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0) + geom_point(alpha = 0.5) + theme_bw() +
    facet_grid(cols = vars(src)),
  
  ggplot(w_deltCO, aes(x = grade_herbs_pr, y = herbs_delta, col = src)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0) + geom_point(alpha = 0.5) + theme_bw() +
    facet_grid(cols = vars(src)),
  
  ggplot(w_deltCO, aes(x = grade_grass_pr, y = grass_delta, col = src)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0) + geom_point(alpha = 0.5) + theme_bw() +
    facet_grid(cols = vars(src)),
  
  ggplot(w_deltCO, aes(x = grade_moss_pr, y = moss_delta, col = src)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0) + geom_point(alpha = 0.5) + theme_bw() +
    facet_grid(cols = vars(src)),
  
  ggplot(w_deltCO, aes(x = grade_deadwood_pr, y = deadwood_delta, col = src)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0) + geom_point(alpha = 0.5) + theme_bw() +
    facet_grid(cols = vars(src)),
  
  ggplot(w_deltCO, aes(x = grade_layers_pr, y = layers_delta, col = src)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0) + geom_point(alpha = 0.5) + theme_bw() +
    facet_grid(cols = vars(src)),
  
  ggplot(w_deltCO, aes(x = grade_mixing_pr, y = mixing_delta, col = src)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0) + geom_point(alpha = 0.5) + theme_bw() +
    facet_grid(cols = vars(src)),
  
  common.legend = TRUE
)

ggarrange(
  ggplot(w_deltGC, aes(x = gc_maturetree_pr, y = maturetree_delta, col = src)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0) + geom_point(alpha = 0.5) + theme_bw() +
    facet_grid(cols = vars(src)),
  
  ggplot(w_deltGC, aes(x = gc_rejuvenation_pr,
                       y = rejuvenation_delta,
                       col = src)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0) + geom_point(alpha = 0.5) + theme_bw() +
    facet_grid(cols = vars(src)),
  
  ggplot(w_deltGC, aes(x = gc_shrublayer_pr, y = shrublayer_delta, col = src)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0) + geom_point(alpha = 0.5) + theme_bw() +
    facet_grid(cols = vars(src)),
  
  ggplot(w_deltGC, aes(x = gc_mosses_pr, y = mosses_delta, col = src)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0) + geom_point(alpha = 0.5) + theme_bw() +
    facet_grid(cols = vars(src)),
  
  ggplot(w_deltGC, aes(x = gc_ferns_pr, y = ferns_delta, col = src)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0) + geom_point(alpha = 0.5) + theme_bw() +
    facet_grid(cols = vars(src)),
  
  ggplot(w_deltGC, aes(x = gc_herblayer_pr, y = herblayer_delta, col = src)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0) + geom_point(alpha = 0.5) + theme_bw() +
    facet_grid(cols = vars(src)),
  
  ggplot(w_deltGC, aes(x = gc_grasses_pr, y = grasses_delta, col = src)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0) + geom_point(alpha = 0.5) + theme_bw() +
    facet_grid(cols = vars(src)),
  
  ggplot(w_deltGC, aes(x = gc_soilfoilage_pr,
                       y = soilfoilage_delta,
                       col = src)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0) + geom_point(alpha = 0.5) + theme_bw() +
    facet_grid(cols = vars(src)),
  
  ggplot(w_deltGC, aes(x = gc_rock_pr, y = rock_delta, col = src)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0) + geom_point(alpha = 0.5) + theme_bw() +
    facet_grid(cols = vars(src)),
  
  ggplot(w_deltGC, aes(x = gc_deadwoodstumps_pr,
                       y = deadwood_delta,
                       col = src)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0) + geom_point(alpha = 0.5) + theme_bw() +
    facet_grid(cols = vars(src)),
  
  common.legend = TRUE
)

ggarrange(
  ggplot(w_deltCO_agg, aes(x = grade_treespecies_gt, y = grade_treespecies_pr, col = src)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
    lims(x = c(0,5), y = c(0,5)) +
    theme_bw(),
  ggplot(w_deltCO_agg, aes(x = grade_shrubs_gt, y = grade_shrubs_pr, col = src)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
    lims(x = c(0,5), y = c(0,5)) +
    theme_bw(),
  ggplot(w_deltCO_agg, aes(x = grade_herbs_gt, y = grade_herbs_pr, col = src)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
    lims(x = c(0,5), y = c(0,5)) +
    theme_bw(),
  ggplot(w_deltCO_agg, aes(x = grade_grass_gt, y = grade_grass_pr, col = src)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
    lims(x = c(0,5), y = c(0,5)) +
    theme_bw(),
  ggplot(w_deltCO_agg, aes(x = grade_moss_gt, y = grade_moss_pr, col = src)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
    lims(x = c(0,5), y = c(0,5)) +
    theme_bw(),
  ggplot(w_deltCO_agg, aes(x = grade_deadwood_gt, y = grade_deadwood_pr, col = src)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
    lims(x = c(0,5), y = c(0,5)) +
    theme_bw(),
  ggplot(w_deltCO_agg, aes(x = grade_layers_gt, y = grade_layers_pr, col = src)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
    lims(x = c(0,5), y = c(0,5)) +
    theme_bw(),
  ggplot(w_deltCO_agg, aes(x = grade_mixing_gt, y = grade_mixing_pr, col = src)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
    lims(x = c(0,5), y = c(0,5)) +
    theme_bw(),
  
  common.legend = TRUE
)

ggarrange(
  ggplot(w_deltGC_agg, aes(x = gc_maturetree_gt, y = gc_maturetree_pr, col = src)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
    lims(x = c(0,1), y = c(0,1)) +
    theme_bw(),
  ggplot(w_deltGC_agg, aes(x = gc_rejuvenation_gt, y = gc_rejuvenation_pr, col = src)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
    lims(x = c(0,1), y = c(0,1)) +
    theme_bw(),
  ggplot(w_deltGC_agg, aes(x = gc_shrublayer_gt, y = gc_shrublayer_pr, col = src)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
    lims(x = c(0,1), y = c(0,1)) +
    theme_bw(),
  ggplot(w_deltGC_agg, aes(x = gc_mosses_gt, y = gc_mosses_pr, col = src)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
    lims(x = c(0,1), y = c(0,1)) +
    theme_bw(),
  ggplot(w_deltGC_agg, aes(x = gc_ferns_gt, y = gc_ferns_pr, col = src)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
    lims(x = c(0,1), y = c(0,1)) +
    theme_bw(),
  ggplot(w_deltGC_agg, aes(x = gc_herblayer_gt, y = gc_herblayer_pr, col = src)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
    lims(x = c(0,1), y = c(0,1)) +
    theme_bw(),
  ggplot(w_deltGC_agg, aes(x = gc_grasses_gt, y = gc_grasses_pr, col = src)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
    lims(x = c(0,1), y = c(0,1)) +
    theme_bw(),
  ggplot(w_deltGC_agg, aes(x = gc_soilfoilage_gt, y = gc_soilfoilage_pr, col = src)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
    lims(x = c(0,1), y = c(0,1)) +
    theme_bw(),
  ggplot(w_deltGC_agg, aes(x = gc_rock_gt, y = gc_rock_pr, col = src)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
    lims(x = c(0,1), y = c(0,1)) +
    theme_bw(),
  ggplot(w_deltGC_agg, aes(x = gc_deadwoodstumps_gt, y = gc_deadwoodstumps_pr, col = src)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
    lims(x = c(0,1), y = c(0,1)) +
    theme_bw(),
  
  common.legend = TRUE,
  nrow = 4, ncol = 3
)

```
#### Supplement figure
Plot groundcover prediction vs. gorund truth for xception and B5 models.
```{r}
tmp_df <- w_deltGC_agg %>% filter(src == "XC" | src == "B5")

tmp_df1 <- tmp_df %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = matches("^gc_.*_(pr|gt)$"),
    names_to = c("parameter", "type"),
    names_pattern = "^gc_(.*)_(pr|gt)$",
    values_to = "value"
  ) %>% select(-ends_with("delta"))
tmp_df2 <- tmp_df %>% 
  select(-starts_with("gc_")) %>% 
  pivot_longer(
    cols = ends_with("_delta"),
    names_to = c("parameter"),
    names_pattern = "^(.*)_delta$",
    values_to = "value"
  ) %>%
  mutate(type = "delta")

plt_df <- bind_rows(tmp_df1, tmp_df2) %>% 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = type,
    values_from = value
  ) %>% 
  mutate(
    parameter = recode(parameter, "deadwoodstumps" = "deadwood")
  )

# Datahandling for complexity
tmp_df_co <- w_deltCO_agg %>% filter(src == "XC" | src == "B5")
tmp_df1 <- tmp_df_co %>% 
  select(-ends_with("_delta")) %>% 
  pivot_longer(
    cols = matches("^grade_.*_(pr|gt)$"),
    names_to = c("parameter", "type"),
    names_pattern = "^grade_(.*)_(pr|gt)$",
    values_to = "value"
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = type,
    values_from = value
  )
tmp_df2<- tmp_df_co %>%
  select(-starts_with("grade_")) %>% 
  pivot_longer(
    cols = ends_with("_delta"),
    names_to = "parameter",
    names_pattern = "^(.*)_delta$",
    values_to = "delta"
  )
plt_df_co <- tmp_df1 %>% left_join(tmp_df2, by = c("triplet", "species", "manag", "src", "parameter"))


ggarrange(
  ggplot(data = plt_df) +
    geom_point(
      aes(x = gt, y = pr, colour = src),
      alpha = 0.5
    ) +
    geom_abline() +
    facet_wrap(~parameter, scale = "free_y") +
    theme_pubr() +
    labs(title = "Groundcover - Xception vs B5"),
  
  ggplot(data = plt_df_co) +
    geom_point(
      aes(x = gt, y = pr, colour = src),
      alpha = 0.5
    ) +
    geom_abline() +
    facet_wrap(~parameter, scale = "free_y") +
    theme_pubr() +
    labs(title = "Complexity - Xception vs B5"),
  
  ncol = 1, nrow = 2,
  labels = "AUTO",
  common.legend = TRUE
)
```


### 4.2.3 Find best and worst img for XCEPTION

XCEPTION model yielded the best results, now look into what picture had the best result and with the worst.

```{r}
l_tmp <- w_deltCO[w_deltCO$src == "XC",] %>%
  dplyr::select(img, ends_with("_delta"))
l_tmp <- data.frame(img = l_tmp[,1], Means = rowMeans(l_tmp[,-1]))
l_tmp[which.min(abs(l_tmp$Means)),]
l_tmp[which.max(abs(l_tmp$Means)),]

l_tmp <- w_deltGC[w_deltGC$src == "XC",] %>%
  dplyr::select(img, ends_with("_delta"))
l_tmp <- data.frame(img = l_tmp[,1], Means = rowMeans(l_tmp[,-1]))
l_tmp[which.min(abs(l_tmp$Means)),]
l_tmp[which.max(abs(l_tmp$Means)),]

rm(l_tmp)
```

#### Complexity (XCEPTION)

Picture with the best result: 63_pine_d_2_E.jpg (mean err -0.001)

![Complexity picture with best result using XCEPTION](F:/Projects/RapidAssessment/03_dataRaw/data/GoPro/lowRes/63_pine/63_pine_d_2_E.jpg)

Picture with the worst result: 24_beech_c_13_S.jpg (mean err -2.537)

![Complexity picture with worst result using XCEPTION](F:/Projects/RapidAssessment/03_dataRaw/data/GoPro/lowRes/24_beech/24_beech_c_13_S.jpg)

#### Groundcover (XCEPTION)

Picture with best result: 2_spruce_c_13_P.jpg (mean err 6.938894e-19)

![ground cover picture with best result using XCEPTION](F:/Projects/RapidAssessment/03_dataRaw/data/GoPro/lowRes/02_spruce/2_spruce_c_13_P.jpg)

Picture with worst result: 63_pine_l_15_P.jpg (mean err 0.1)

![Ground cover picture with worst result using XCEPTION](F:/Projects/RapidAssessment/03_dataRaw/data/GoPro/lowRes/63_pine/63_pine_l_15_P.jpg)

##### Plots

```{r}
best_co <- "63_pine_d_2_E"
bad_co <- "24_beech_c_13_S"
best_gc <- "2_spruce_c_13_P"
bad_gc <- "63_pine_l_15_P"

lplots_co[[which(levels(l_dfCOdata$img) == best_co)]] #best
lplots_co[[which(levels(l_dfCOdata$img) == bad_co)]] #worst

# Check x images randomly

l_col <- c("lightblue","orange3")
## complexity plots
ggarrange(
  # best picture
  ggplot(l_dfCOdata[l_dfCOdata$img == best_co &
                      (l_dfCOdata$src == "GT" | l_dfCOdata$src == "XC"),], 
         aes(x = paras, y = vals, fill = src)) +
    geom_col(position = "dodge") +
    labs(y = "Structure grade", x = NULL,
         title = "complexity per class for best", fill = NULL) +
    geom_text(aes(label = round(vals, 2)),
              position = position_dodge(width = 0.9),vjust = -0.5,size = 3) +
    ylim(0,5) + theme_minimal() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1)) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = l_col),
  
  # worst picture
  ggplot(l_dfCOdata[l_dfCOdata$img == bad_co &
                      (l_dfCOdata$src == "GT" | l_dfCOdata$src == "XC"),], 
         aes(x = paras, y = vals, fill = src)) +
    geom_bar(position = "dodge", stat = "identity") +
    labs(y = "Structure grade", x = NULL,
         title = "complexity per class for worst", fill = NULL) +
    geom_text(aes(label = round(vals, 2)),
              position = position_dodge(width = 0.9),vjust = -0.5,size = 3) +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,5)) + theme_minimal() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1)) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = l_col),
  
  common.legend = TRUE, labels = "auto"
)


## ground truth plots
ggarrange(
  # best picture
  ggplot(l_dfGCdata[l_dfGCdata$img == best_gc &
                      (l_dfGCdata$src == "GT" | l_dfGCdata$src == "XC"),], 
         aes(x = paras, y = vals, fill = src)) +
    geom_bar(position = "dodge", stat = "identity") +
    labs(y = "% ground cover", x = NULL,
         title = "ground cover per class for best", fill = NULL) +
    geom_text(aes(label = round(vals, 2)),
              position = position_dodge(width = 0.9),vjust = -0.5,size = 3) +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1)) + theme_minimal() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1)) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = l_col),
  
  # worst picture
  ggplot(l_dfGCdata[l_dfGCdata$img == bad_gc &
                      (l_dfGCdata$src == "GT" | l_dfGCdata$src == "XC"),], 
         aes(x = paras, y = vals, fill = src)) +
    geom_bar(position = "dodge", stat = "identity") +
    labs(y = "% ground cover", x = NULL, 
         title = "ground cover per class for worst", fill = NULL) +
    geom_text(aes(label = round(vals, 2)),
              position = position_dodge(width = 0.9),vjust = -0.5,size = 3) +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1)) + theme_minimal() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1)) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = l_col),

  common.legend = TRUE, labels = "auto"
)

## Plot means of xception and groundtruth
ggarrange(
  ggplot(l_dfCOmeans[l_dfCOmeans$src == "XC" | l_dfCOmeans$src == "GT",],
         aes(x = para, y = mean, fill = src)) +
    geom_bar(position = "dodge", stat = "identity") +
    geom_errorbar(aes(x = para, 
                      ymin = mean-(sd/sqrt(345)),
                      ymax = mean+(sd/sqrt(345))),
                  alpha = 0.8,
                  position = position_dodge(width=0.9),
                  width = 0.4) +
    labs(y = "Structure grade", x = NULL, fill = NULL, title = "Mean complexity")+
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,5)) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1)) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = l_col, labels = c("Groundtruth","XCEPTION")) +
    scale_x_discrete(labels = c("Amt. deadwood", "Amt. grass sp.",
                                "Amt. herb sp.", "Vertical layers", "Mixing",
                                "Amt. moss sp.", "Amt. shrub sp.",
                                "Amt. tree sp.")),
  
  ggplot(l_dfGCmeans[l_dfGCmeans$src == "XC" | l_dfGCmeans$src == "GT",],
         aes(x = para, y = mean, fill = src)) +
    geom_bar(position = "dodge", stat = "identity") +
    geom_errorbar(aes(x = para, 
                      ymin = mean-(sd/sqrt(345)),
                      ymax = mean+(sd/sqrt(345))),
                  alpha = 0.8,
                  position = position_dodge(width=0.9),
                  width = 0.4) +
    labs(y = "% ground cover", x = NULL, fill = NULL, title = "Mean groundcover")+
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1)) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1)) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = l_col, labels = c("Groundtruth","XCEPTION")) +
    scale_x_discrete(labels = c("Deadwood", "Ferns", "Grasses", "Herbs",
                                "Mature tree", "Moss", "Rejuvenation",
                                "Rock", "Shrubs", "Soil / foilage")),

  common.legend = TRUE, labels = "auto"
)
```
##### Check a number of imgs
###### Context imgs
Plot randomly 50 context images (14.5%) with groundtruth and predictions of all DNN models.
```{r}
set.seed(1312) # For reproducibility
random_indices <- sample(seq_along(lplots_co), 50)
lplots_co[random_indices]
```
###### Groundcover imgs
Plot randomly 50 groundcover images (4.0%) with groundtruth and predictions of all DNN models.
```{r}
set.seed(1312) # For reproducibility
random_indices <- sample(seq_along(lplots_gc), 50)
lplots_gc[random_indices]
```


# Cleanup

Remove all variables and dataframes + functions from R environment.

```{r}
rm(lplots_co,lplots_gc,l_col)
rm(l_dfCOdata, l_dfCOmeans, l_dfGCdata, l_dfGCmeans)
rm(w_deltCO, w_deltCO_agg, w_deltCO_means, w_deltCOagg_means)
rm(w_deltGC, w_deltGC_agg, w_deltGC_means, w_deltGCagg_means)
rm(w_dfCOdata, w_dfCOmeans, w_dfGCdata, w_dfGCmeans)
rm(f_plot_img_bars_co,f_plot_img_bars_gc)
rm(co_errors, gc_errors)
rm(l_B2co, l_B2gc, l_B5gc, l_B5co, l_deltCO, l_deltGC)
rm(l_GTco, l_GTgc, l_TYco, l_TYgc, l_XCco, l_XCgc)

rm(bad_co, bad_gc, best_co, best_gc)
rm(f_calc_errors, f_long_pr_gt_delt, f_MAE, f_MSE, f_R2, f_RMSE)

rm(random_indices, strWDpath)
rm(plt_df, plt_df_co, tmp_df, tmp_df1, tmp_df2, tmp_df_co)
```
